creator: papowell@astart.com
text:
Created attachment 153593
linux-oracle-12 SHAR

The linux-oracle-instantclient ports provide a linux based Oracle sqlclient interface to the oracle database.  The version in the FreeBSD ports is based on
a 2006 Linux compatible set of libraries.  These ports update the libraries to
Version 12.1.0.2.0.  To avoid conflicts with the current ports these versions
have been named:

linux-oracle-12-instantclient-basic
linux-oracle-12-instantclient-sdk
linux-oracle-12-instantclient-sqlplus

The sqlplus executable requires the linux libaio library.  A port to download
and install this for the Linux C6 release is included.

Could these ports please be added to the FreeBSD ports?

Note: checked with portlint.  The libaio library is not easily available for the
Linux F10 release so it is not included.  I suppose that the ports should be
named linux-c6-xxx, but the current versions do not indicate the verion of Linux.
